title: Central deploy policy (pipeline.deploy-policy.v0, ADR-0034)
description: Structure-only validation for the OPTIONAL central deploy-policy.yaml, discovered by plugins/pipeline-core/lib/manifest.mjs's loadDeployPolicy() via the project manifest's governance.policies_path (fixed filename `deploy-policy.yaml`). Validated with the same hand-rolled schema-lite validator as pipeline-manifest.schema.json (plugins/pipeline-core/lib/schema-lite.mjs) -- understands exactly: type, required, properties, items, enum, additionalProperties. The ORDINAL meaning of type_floor/mode_floor and the advisory/mandate/strict strictness semantics are enforced as CODE in manifest.mjs's checkDeployPrecedence, not here (schema-lite has no ordinal/pattern keyword).

mode.description: advisory: guideline only, undocumented deviations are a Critic finding (ADR-0030). mandate: hard floor, a violation blocks UNLESS covered by a valid non-expired docs/risks.md deviation record. strict: hard floor, deviation records are ignored entirely.

adapters.description: OPTIONAL allowlist of adapter names a project may configure (omit = no restriction).

targets.description: OPTIONAL allowlist of deploy-destination ids (omit = no restriction). When present, every project env MUST declare a `target` from this list (checkDeployPrecedence D2 -- absence-is-not-compliance).

type_floor.description: OPTIONAL ordinal floor (automated < human) -- checkDeployPrecedence D3.

mode_floor.description: OPTIONAL ordinal floor (off < warn < blocking); v1-vacuous-but-reserved -- a human-gated promote is already `blocking` by canon and the release schema exposes no per-env promote MODE knob (checkDeployPrecedence D3).

required.description: FORWARD-DECLARED, consumed by the deploy-log evidence check at deploy time -- NOT enforced by this precedence engine (checkDeployPrecedence reads policy.evidence not at all).
